series_metadata.series_description: The documents in this file are compiled in a uniform format and are to be followed in an emergency situation or in case of crises. Documents are part of the current business continuity plan. Human Resource is the primary source for these records, with Facilities acting as a secondary source for incident reports and crises responses. Documents maintained in this file will include: evacuation plans; floor plans; locations for safety in case of tornado; emergency exits and extinguisher locations; fire drills; protocol for hostage situations; threatening situations domestic and other; Incident Reports; Building Evacuation Assistance Requests; crises response notes, reports, charts, documents, and correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: The current plan is maintained on a permanent basis. Destroy old documents when a new plan is updated, superceded or becomes obsolete. ; Electronic: The current plan is maintained on a permanent basis. Destroy old documents when a new plan is updated, superceded or becomes obsolete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
